version_description: From 1999. Link to the song: https://youtu.be/cB9JJIoAdYM.
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
THEN THE MORNING COMES
As recorded by Smash Mouth
(From the 1999 Album ASTRO LOUNGE)



[Intro]
[tab]N.C.         [ch]Cm[/ch] [ch]Fm[/ch]   [ch]Cm[/ch] [ch]Fm[/ch]   [ch]Cm[/ch] [ch]Fm[/ch]   [ch]Cm[/ch] [ch]Fm[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]
Good morning...[/tab]

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]Cm[/ch]
Paint the town[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cm[/ch]
Take a bow [/tab]
[tab][ch]Cm[/ch]
Thank everybody[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Fm[/ch]     [ch]Cm[/ch]
You're gonna do it again[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cm[/ch]
You are the few, the proud[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cm[/ch]
You are the antibody[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Fm[/ch]       [ch]Cm[/ch]
Mind, soul and zen[/tab]

[Pre-Chorus]
[tab]        [ch]Fm[/ch]        [ch]Cm[/ch]
And the world's a stage[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cm[/ch]
(And the world's a faze)[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Fm[/ch]     [ch]G7[/ch]
And the end is near[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Cm7[/ch]
So push rewind[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cm7[/ch]
Just in time[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cm7[/ch]
Thank anybody[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Fm[/ch]     [ch]Cm[/ch]
You're gonna do it again[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]N.C.            [ch]Eb[/ch]  [ch]Ab[/ch]
The way the you walk[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]            [ch]Fm[/ch]           [ch]Eb[/ch]
It's just the way that you talk[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]Bb[/ch]
Like it ain't no thing[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Fm[/ch]           [ch]Eb[/ch]     [ch]Ab[/ch]     [ch]Gm7[/ch]
And every single day is just a fling[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]Cm[/ch]   [ch]Fm[/ch]   [ch]Cm[/ch] [ch]Fm[/ch]
Then the morning comes[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]Cm[/ch]
Take your knocks[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cm[/ch]
Shake them off[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cm[/ch]
Duck everybody[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Fm[/ch]         [ch]Cm[/ch]
You're gonna take them again[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cm7[/ch]          [ch]Fm[/ch]        [ch]Cm[/ch]
You are your foe, your friend[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cm[/ch]
You are the paparazzi[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Fm[/ch]    [ch]Cm[/ch]  [ch]Fm[/ch]
You are the tragedian[/tab]

[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]Cm[/ch]      [ch]Fm[/ch]        [ch]Cm[/ch]
And the world's a craze[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cm[/ch]
(And the world's a faze)[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Fm[/ch]     [ch]G7[/ch]
And the end is near[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cm7[/ch]
So push rewind[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cm7[/ch]
Just in time[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cm7[/ch]
Thank anybody[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Fm[/ch]     [ch]Cm[/ch]
You're gonna do it again[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]N.C.            [ch]Eb[/ch]   [ch]Ab[/ch]
The way the you walk[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]            [ch]Fm[/ch]           [ch]Eb[/ch]
It's just the way that you talk[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Ab[/ch]       [ch]Bb[/ch]
Like it ain't no thing[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Fm[/ch]           [ch]Eb[/ch]     [ch]Ab[/ch]     [ch]Gm[/ch]
And every single day is just a fling[/tab]

[Bridge]
[tab]                     [ch]C[/ch]        [ch]F[/ch]
And when it comes it moves so slow[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]C[/ch]                 [ch]F[/ch]
Kinda like it's saying I told you so[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]               [ch]F[/ch]
Looking back before she goes[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]E[/ch]              [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]Dm[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]Dm[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]Dm[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]Dm[/ch] 
Tomorrow's gonna hurt[/tab]

[Guitar Solo]
[ch]Cm[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch] [ch]Cm[/ch]    [ch]F[/ch] [ch]Cm[/ch] [ch]Fm[/ch] [ch]Cm[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]   [ch]Cm[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]  [ch]Cm[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]  

[Pre-Chorus]
[tab]        [ch]Fm[/ch]        [ch]Cm[/ch]
And the world's a stage[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cm[/ch]
(And the world's a faze)[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Fm[/ch]     [ch]G7[/ch]
And the end is near[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Cm7[/ch]
So push rewind[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cm7[/ch]
Just in time[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cm7[/ch]
Thank anybody[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Fm[/ch]           [ch]Eb[/ch]  [ch]Ab[/ch]
It's just the way that you are[/tab]

[Out-Chorus]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]            [ch]Fm[/ch]           [ch]Eb[/ch]
It's just the way that you talk[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Ab[/ch]       [ch]Bb[/ch]
Like it ain't no thing[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Fm[/ch]           [ch]Eb[/ch]            [ch]Gm[/ch]
And every single day is just a fling[/tab]
N.C.
Then the morning comes
